overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a brutalist concrete corridor in a cyberpunk city, transitioning from enclosed interior to an open plaza with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance. The video game footage features cinematic lighting and high-quality rendering typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

tall grey concrete wall with vertical panel textures running along the right side of the corridor
massive rectangular concrete portal framing the corridor ahead, creating a repeating tunnel effect

tall palm trees becoming visible at the far end of the corridor against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily through a narrow, enclosed brutalist corridor with high concrete walls and repeating rectangular archways overhead. A glowing blue panel is passed on the left wall early on, while distant palm trees become visible at the corridor's end as natural light increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza exit with view of futuristic city skyline

events.description: exits the covered concrete corridor into the open urban plaza with city view
white sedan drives past from left to right across the plaza entrance

agents.ego_description: walking out of the corridor into the open plaza while approaching the street

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving from left to right across the field of view

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible in the hazy distance beyond the plaza
modern white car driving along the road visible through the archway
wet tiled ground surface of the open plaza reflecting the ambient light

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the enclosed corridor through the final concrete archway into an open urban plaza. A futuristic city skyline rises in the hazy distance while palm trees frame the exit. A white sedan drives past from left to right as the camera approaches the street level, transitioning from the sheltered interior to the exposed exterior environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic brutalist interior into a vast, hazy futuristic cityscape. It begins by moving steadily through a narrow concrete corridor defined by high walls and repeating rectangular archways, passing a glowing blue panel on the left. As the camera advances, the oppressive enclosure gives way to increasing natural light and the first glimpse of distant palm trees. The scene then opens as the camera passes through the final archway, transitioning from the sheltered corridor into an expansive urban plaza. Finally, the view expands to reveal a towering skyline in the distance while a white sedan drives across the frame, completing the shift from the concrete interior to the exposed city environment.
